If you liked the original better, its archived on my page! Have fun everyone ;)

Have you ever dreamed of absolute control? Now it's yours—reshape reality itself. Alter bodies, swap genders, bend minds, or warp the world around you. Every choice is yours... will you indulge, experiment, or rewrite existence itself?

Themes: Reality warping, body/gender transformation, mind control, power fantasy, and taboo exploration.

ART BY Minori
